summary: Frontend Developer with 6+ years of experience leading UI work on large, production platforms. I've owned frontend architecture, guided interface decisions, and shipped complex applications used across distributed teams. My background spans enterprise systems and custom products, with a consistent focus on interface quality that holds up as software scales. I move comfortably across React, Vue, Angular, Next.js, and Astro depending on what a project needs, and work regularly with TypeScript, TanStack Query, Supabase, and Vercel on the integration and deployment side.

positions.title: Lead Engineer
bullets: Led frontend architecture for multiple production applications, introducing Storybook and shared frontend patterns that improved consistency and reduced redundant UI work as systems scaled.

Partnered with the MLOps team to deploy and configure a locally-hosted LLM environment for the unclassified team, enabling development workflows under strict compliance constraints. Took initiative to bridge a gap between classified and unclassified tooling, then led the frontend redesign of the chatbot interface.

Designed and delivered a stepper-driven data portal to replace a manual Excel and email process, streamlining a previously error-prone workflow, reducing support tickets, and strengthening the proposal against competing bids on a high-value contract.
Worked with stakeholders and designers early in the process, using Figma-based workflows and lightweight prototypes to shape interaction and layout decisions before writing large amounts of code.

positions.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Rebuilt and modernized large frontend surfaces by migrating legacy Angular-based interfaces to React, improving structure, readability, and long-term maintainability.
Implemented complex dashboard views and workflow-driven UIs by integrating backend APIs into custom frontend components rather than relying on embedded third-party tools.
Partnered with designers and product stakeholders to translate early concepts into production-ready interfaces, refining layouts and interaction behavior as requirements evolved.

experience.title: Founder
bullets: Delivered custom frontend work for small businesses and nonprofits, owning UI design decisions, frontend implementation, and deployment across a range of project scopes.

Designed and built an employee portal and scheduling platform for a multi-state restaurant franchise, still in active use years after launch and supporting hundreds of employees across multiple locations.
Built accessible, responsive interfaces using modern frontend frameworks, balancing polish with maintainability and clear documentation for future handoff.

experience.title: UI Developer
bullets: Produced wireframes and interaction flows that clarified UI requirements and helped establish the initial frontend structure before full implementation.
Worked closely with engineers to translate design intent into reusable component patterns, contributing early Storybook examples in TypeScript to guide consistent development.
Helped align design and engineering expectations by documenting layout decisions and interaction behavior, reducing ambiguity as the project moved into build phases.

experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Built data-heavy geospatial interfaces using Vue and Vuetify, supporting analyst workflows that relied on clear hierarchy and predictable interaction patterns.
Implemented scroll-driven and timeline-based interactions using GSAP, translating motion concepts into performant frontend behavior within strict layout constraints.
Converted existing animation and interaction concepts into accessible Vue components, balancing visual intent with usability and performance requirements.

awards.title: Platinum Award (Booz Allen Hamilton)
awards.details: Built and shipped a custom registration and scheduling platform for a large multi-day convention (100+ attendees), centralizing session sign-ups and on-site check-in and supporting real-time scheduling during the event.

awards.title: Gold Award (Booz Allen Hamilton)
awards.details: Led an iterative design and prototyping process incorporating stakeholder feedback at each stage; the final direction was chosen over a competing proposal, accelerating stakeholder buy-in and streamlining implementation.

awards.title: Gold Award (Booz Allen Hamilton)
awards.details: Directed the redesign and rebuild of a high-visibility enterprise application used across multiple client teams; improvements to usability and visual clarity increased adoption and earned recognition from Amazon Developers for design excellence.

projects.title: No Whiteboard Jobs Dashboard
projects.description: Production dashboard built on the Hiring Without Whiteboards dataset with search, filtering, pagination, and responsive card/list views. Built with Astro, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: By Astrid Beauty Salon
projects.description: Production website built for a local hair salon with Astro and Tailwind on a performance-first, mobile-responsive layout with accessible markup and SEO-friendly structure.

projects.title: Potomac Family Dining
projects.description: Enterprise web platform for a multi-state restaurant franchise, including employee portal, careers, directory, and contact workflows. Built with Vue.js, JavaScript, and Firebase.

Combined: HTML/CSS • JavaScript • TypeScript • React • Next.js • Vue • Angular • Animations (GSAP, Framer Motion) • Figma • Storybook • TanStack Query • REST API Integration • PostgreSQL • Supabase • Vercel • Git • CI/CD Pipelines • Testing • WCAG & Section 508 • GitHub Copilot • Postman
